name: The Hole Thing
tagline: Santa Rosa's female-owned tattoo & piercing studio — Best of North Bay since 1997.
seoDescription: The Hole Thing — female-owned tattoo, piercing & tooth gem studio on Santa Rosa Ave since 1997. Best of North Bay, walk-ins welcome in Sonoma County.

contact.address: 324 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95404

hero.heading: Ink, piercings, and a little sparkle.
hero.subheading: Santa Rosa's female-owned, locally loved tattoo and body-piercing studio since 1997 — custom tattoos, expert piercings, and tooth gems, walk-ins welcome.

images.heroAlt: The Hole Thing tattoo and piercing studio in Santa Rosa

about.heading: Sonoma County's studio since 1997
body: The Hole Thing has been Santa Rosa's female-owned home for tattoos and piercings since 1997, settling into our Santa Rosa Avenue studio in 2005. Two-plus decades in, we're proud to be a name locals trust — and to have been voted Best of North Bay year after year.

Our owner is one of the industry's most experienced piercers, with 20+ years behind the needle, alongside a roster of tattoo artists whose portfolios you're welcome to browse. Walk-ins are always welcome, consultations are free, and yes — we're family-friendly and happy to do little ones' ear piercings too.

services.title: Custom tattoos
services.description: Original work and walk-ins from artists with portfolios you can browse first — free consultations, any time.

services.title: Body piercing
services.description: Ears, septum, and everything beyond — done by one of the North Bay's most experienced piercers, 20+ years in.

services.title: Tooth gems
services.description: A quick, painless little sparkle — Sonoma County's go-to spot for tooth gems.

services.title: Kids' & first piercings
services.description: Family-friendly and gentle with first-timers, so little ones (and nervous grown-ups) are in good hands.

hoursNote: Walk-ins welcome — call ahead for the artist you want.

sections.heading: Tattoos, piercings & a little sparkle
sections.intro: Walk in or book a free consultation — here's what we do best.

items.quote: I got pierced by Kelley, who owns the shop, and she was awesome — super friendly, and I felt totally comfortable the whole time.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.quote: Such a soothing voice, and completely understanding of me being nervous. She turned the music down at my request and talked me right through it.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.quote: I've gotten four piercings from her and I'll keep going back. Incredibly knowledgeable, and answers every question without overwhelming you.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.a: Always. Walk-ins are welcome for piercings and tattoos — for a specific artist or a busy weekend, it's worth a quick call to (707) 570-2879 first.

items.q: Can my child get pierced here?
items.a: Yes — we're a family-friendly studio and happy to do little ones' ear piercings. Bring a valid ID and we'll walk you both through it.

items.q: Do I need an appointment for a tattoo?
items.a: Not to get started. Browse our artists' portfolios, book a free consultation, and we'll plan your piece together before you sit down.
Kelley, the shop's owner — 20-plus years in, and known as one of the North Bay's most careful, knowledgeable piercers.

sections.heading: Walk in, or let's plan it.
sections.text: Tattoos, piercings, and tooth gems — by some of the friendliest hands in Sonoma County.
